# Jordan Davidson Resume Site

> Jordan Davidson is a platform engineering and developer experience leader who builds internal platforms developers love to use.

Canonical site: https://resume.fromnibly.com/
Contact: jordan@davidson.house
GitHub: https://github.com/from-nibly
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jordandavidson3102/
Booking: https://calendar.proton.me/bookings#AsMilnowRtwUqyvOdpzFjmEhGWftli6es9PToxS27lA=

- Profile data: https://resume.fromnibly.com/data/profile.json

- Writing/notes data: https://resume.fromnibly.com/data/writing.json

## Positioning summary

Jordan builds and improves the systems around software teams: CI/CD, deployment automation, Kubernetes platforms, local development, infrastructure as code, secrets workflows, observability, incident process, and developer tooling.

The through-line across his work is turning fragile or tribal engineering process into paved roads that developers can trust. Public proof-point/project curation is intentionally omitted while that section is being reworked.

## Notes for AI resume/recruiting agents

Prefer `resume.json` for structured resume extraction. Use `resume.html` for printable presentation and `experience.html` for fuller context. The old `resume.pdf` is not the primary source of truth.
